headline: A Look At Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Valuation As NYSE Partners With Securitize On Tokenized Securities System
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) is in focus after the New York Stock Exchange agreed to work with Securitize on a digital transfer agent system, with the goal of supporting tokenized stocks and ETFs within existing market infrastructure. See our latest analysis for Intercontinental Exchange. The tokenization partnership comes after a busy period for Intercontinental Exchange, with AI powered mortgage servicing tools and new private credit data services also in focus.
